# Snake Game

> A free, browser-based Snake game with modern graphics, persistent high scores, and mobile swipe controls. Play instantly at [thesnakegame.onrender.com](https://thesnakegame.onrender.com/).

## About

Snake Game is a modern twist on the classic arcade game, rebuilt for today's web using HTML5 Canvas and vanilla JavaScript. Navigate the snake to eat food, grow longer, and chase your highest score — all directly in your browser with zero downloads or installations.

## Features

- Classic snake gameplay with smooth animations
- Desktop controls via arrow keys or WASD
- Mobile and touchscreen support with swipe gestures
- Persistent high score saved locally in the browser via localStorage
- Modern dark theme UI with neon green styling and glow effects
- Responsive layout that adapts to any screen size
- Collision detection with walls and self

## How to Play

1. Visit [thesnakegame.onrender.com](https://thesnakegame.onrender.com/)
2. Click "Start Game" or use keyboard/swipe controls
3. Guide the snake to eat the red food squares to grow and score points
4. Each food item is worth 10 points
5. The game ends if the snake hits a wall or itself
6. Your best score is automatically saved

## Technical Details

- Built with HTML5 Canvas and vanilla JavaScript — no frameworks or dependencies
- Content Security Policy (CSP) for XSS protection
- Open source under the Apache License 2.0
- Works in all modern browsers (Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge, Opera)
